revision.text:
{{Redirect-distinguish|WP:RC|Help:Related changes|Special:RecentChanges{{!}}the recent changes page itself|Wikipedia:Requests for closure|Wikipedia:WikiProject Roman Catholicism}} {{Information page|WP:RC}} {{Sidebar |class=wikitable plainlinks |width=auto |contentstyle=font-size:90%;padding-top:0.2em;line-height:1.6em; |headingstyle=background:#E9E9E9;padding:0.1em 0;font-size:95%; |heading1=[[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Things to review]] |content1= *[http://copypatrol.wmcloud.org/en Copyvios] *[[Special:NewPagesFeed|New pages]] *[[Special:NewFiles|New files]] *[http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Contributions&contribs=newbie New editors] *[http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:RecentChanges&userExpLevel=unregistered IP edits] *[[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] }} The [[Special:Recentchanges|'''recent changes page''']] is accessed from the Interaction Menu on Wikipedia's sidebar (displayed on the left side of the screen). It lists the most recent edits made to pages on [[Wikipedia]]. Using this page, you can monitor and [[WP:RPC|review]] the latest contributions, to discover and correct mistakes and to spot and revert [[WP:VAND|vandalism]].
Options can be set to filter and display recent changes according to the preferred criteria (present at the top of the recent changes page, containing three sections: "This page", "Utilities" and "About us"). The available filters are [[wp:FA|featured articles]], [[wp:GA|good articles]], [[wp:BLP|living people]], new editors' contribs, IPs' contribs, mobile contribs and by [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]]. It can also be filtered according to [[Special:tags|tags]] by typing in the specific one, such as "Visual edit", "large plot addition" or "blanking", etc.
Most (although not all) [[WP:BOTS|bot edits]] should be marked with the [[WP:BOTFLAG|bot flag]] and be hidden by default (if enabled, they will be marked with a '''b''' in the recent changes logs and in [[WP:WATCHLIST|watchlists]]). If you see a bot edit that shouldn't appear in the recent change logs or your watchlist, please report it to the bot operator per [[WP:BOTISSUE]].
For a more detailed description, see the [[mw:Help:Recent changes|recent changes help page]] on [[MediaWiki]].
==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Recent changes patrol]] *[[Wikipedia:Counter Vandalism Unit]] *[[Special:AbuseLog]]
{{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help]]

{{Redirect-distinguish|WP:RC|Help:Related changes|Special:RecentChanges{{!}}the recent changes page itself|Wikipedia:Requests for closure|Wikipedia:WikiProject Roman Catholicism}} {{Information page|WP:RC}} {{Sidebar |class=wikitable plainlinks |width=auto |contentstyle=font-size:90%;padding-top:0.2em;line-height:1.6em; |headingstyle=background:#E9E9E9;padding:0.1em 0;font-size:95%; |heading1=[[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Things to review]] |content1= *[http://copypatrol.wmcloud.org/en Copyvios] *[[Special:NewPagesFeed|New pages]] *[[Special:NewFiles|New files]] *[http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Contributions&contribs=newbie New editors] *[http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:RecentChanges&userExpLevel=unregistered IP edits] *[[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] }} The [[Special:Recentchanges|'''recent changes page''']] is accessed from the Interaction Menu on Wikipedia's sidebar (displayed on the left side of the screen). It lists the most recent edits made to pages on [[Wikipedia]]. Using this page, you can monitor and [[WP:RPC|review]] the latest contributions, to discover and correct mistakes and to spot and revert [[WP:VAND|vandalism]].
Options can be set to filter and display recent changes according to the preferred criteria (present at the top of the recent changes page, containing three sections: "This page", "Utilities" and "About us"). The available filters are [[wp:FA|featured articles]], [[wp:GA|good articles]], [[wp:BLP|living people]], new editors' contribs, IPs' contribs, mobile contribs and by [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]]. It can also be filtered according to [[Special:tags|tags]] by typing in the specific one, such as "Visual edit", "large plot addition" or "blanking", etc.
Most (although not all) [[WP:BOTS|bot edits]] should be marked with the [[WP:BOTFLAG|bot flag]] and be hidden by default (if enabled, they will be marked with a '''b''' in the recent changes logs and in [[WP:WATCHLIST|watchlists]]). If you see a bot edit that shouldn't appear in the recent change logs or your watchlist, please report it to the bot operator per [[WP:BOTISSUE]].
For a more detailed description, see the [[mw:Help:Recent changes|recent changes help page]] on [[MediaWiki]].
==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Recent changes patrol]] *[[Wikipedia:Counter Vandalism Unit]] *[[Special:AbuseLog]]
{{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Redirect-distinguish|WP:RC|Help:Related changes|Special:RecentChanges{{!}}the recent changes page itself|Wikipedia:Requests for closure|Wikipedia:WikiProject Roman Catholicism}} {{Information page|WP:RC}} {{Sidebar |class=wikitable plainlinks |width=auto |contentstyle=font-size:90%;padding-top:0.2em;line-height:1.6em; |headingstyle=background:#E9E9E9;padding:0.1em 0;font-size:95%; |heading1=[[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Things to review]] |content1= *[http://copypatrol.wmcloud.org/en Copyvios] *[[Special:NewPagesFeed|New pages]] *[[Special:NewFiles|New files]] *[http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Contributions&contribs=newbie New editors] *[http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:RecentChanges&userExpLevel=unregistered IP edits] *[[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] }} The [[Special:Recentchanges|'''recent changes page''']] is accessed from the Interaction Menu on Wikipedia's sidebar (displayed on the left side of the screen). It lists the most recent edits made to pages on [[Wikipedia]]. Using this page, you can monitor and [[WP:RPC|review]] the latest contributions, to discover and correct mistakes and to spot and revert [[WP:VAND|vandalism]].
Options can be set to filter and display recent changes according to the preferred criteria (present at the top of the recent changes page, containing three sections: "This page", "Utilities" and "About us"). The available filters are [[wp:FA|featured articles]], [[wp:GA|good articles]], [[wp:BLP|living people]], new editors' contribs, IPs' contribs, mobile contribs and by [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]]. It can also be filtered according to [[Special:tags|tags]] by typing in the specific one, such as "Visual edit", "large plot addition" or "blanking", etc.
Most (although not all) [[WP:BOTS|bot edits]] should be marked with the [[WP:BOTFLAG|bot flag]] and be hidden by default (if enabled, they will be marked with a '''b''' in the recent changes logs and in [[WP:WATCHLIST|watchlists]]). If you see a bot edit that shouldn't appear in the recent change logs or your watchlist, please report it to the bot operator per [[WP:BOTISSUE]].
For a more detailed description, see the [[mw:Help:Recent changes|recent changes help page]] on [[:en:MediaWiki|MediaWiki]].
==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Recent changes patrol]] *[[Wikipedia:Counter Vandalism Unit]] *[[Special:AbuseLog]]
{{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Redirect-distinguish|WP:RC|Help:Related changes|Special:RecentChanges{{!}}the recent changes page itself|Wikipedia:Requests for closure|Wikipedia:WikiProject Roman Catholicism}} {{Information page|WP:RC}} {{Sidebar |class=wikitable plainlinks |width=auto |contentstyle=font-size:90%;padding-top:0.2em;line-height:1.6em; |headingstyle=background:#E9E9E9;padding:0.1em 0;font-size:95%; |heading1=[[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Things to review]] |content1= *[http://copypatrol.wmcloud.org/en Copyvios] *[[Special:NewPagesFeed|New pages]] *[[Special:NewFiles|New files]] *[http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Contributions&contribs=newbie New editors] *[http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:RecentChanges&userExpLevel=unregistered IP edits] *[[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] }} The [[Special:Recentchanges|'''recent changes page''']] is accessed from the Interaction Menu on Wikipedia's sidebar (displayed on the left side of the screen). It lists the most recent edits made to pages on [[:en:Wikipedia|Wikipedia]]. Using this page, you can monitor and [[WP:RPC|review]] the latest contributions, to discover and correct mistakes and to spot and revert [[WP:VAND|vandalism]].
Options can be set to filter and display recent changes according to the preferred criteria (present at the top of the recent changes page, containing three sections: "This page", "Utilities" and "About us"). The available filters are [[wp:FA|featured articles]], [[wp:GA|good articles]], [[wp:BLP|living people]], new editors' contribs, IPs' contribs, mobile contribs and by [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]]. It can also be filtered according to [[Special:tags|tags]] by typing in the specific one, such as "Visual edit", "large plot addition" or "blanking", etc.
Most (although not all) [[WP:BOTS|bot edits]] should be marked with the [[WP:BOTFLAG|bot flag]] and be hidden by default (if enabled, they will be marked with a '''b''' in the recent changes logs and in [[WP:WATCHLIST|watchlists]]). If you see a bot edit that shouldn't appear in the recent change logs or your watchlist, please report it to the bot operator per [[WP:BOTISSUE]].
For a more detailed description, see the [[mw:Help:Recent changes|recent changes help page]] on [[:en:MediaWiki|MediaWiki]].
==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Recent changes patrol]] *[[Wikipedia:Counter Vandalism Unit]] *[[Special:AbuseLog]]
{{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help]]
